name: Stickman Shooter 3 Among Monsters
description: Stickman shooter 3 is back!! The amons us zombies and monsters are attacking the fort and its time to destroy everything again. Be ready for the exciting stickman shooting game. Defend the base against many types of among monsters and dont let reach the base. Improve the parameters of the weapon - accuracy, speed of fire and reload, the number of bullets in the magazine to destroy more powerfull enemies. Survive all levels and be the best stickman soldier.
instructions: Controls Use the mouse to aim and shootTouch the screen on mobile devices
